headline: Regions to pay $4.9M for allegedly forgiving ineligible PPP loan
summary: The Department of Justice said that Birmingham, Alabama-based Regions sought forgiveness from the Small Business Administration for a Paycheck Protection Program loan that the bank should have known did not qualify.

headline: Regions Financial (RF): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Regions Financial trades at $27.83 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 9.4% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 9.7%.
